findings.text: Risk scores at or above policy.max_risk are now allowed instead of denied, reversing the risk gate.
Admin users are now denied unconditionally, reversing the previous admin approval path.
The blocked_states denial check was removed, so locked or otherwise blocked states can be allowed.
summarize_recent returns limit + 1 items when enough results exist, violating the limit.
format_audit_label changes the audit label prefix, likely breaking consumers expecting decision:<change_id>.
